parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.item.json;
if (d.skip) return [];

const prompt = 'You are a Tier 2 SOC Analyst. Summarize this security alert in a concise, professional briefing for an on-call engineer.

Alert Details:
- Rule: ' + (d.rule_description || 'N/A') + '
- Rule ID: ' + (d.rule_id || 'N/A') + '
- Severity: ' + d.severity + '/15
- Source IP: ' + d.source_ip + '
- Destination IP: ' + d.dest_ip + '
- Affected Host: ' + d.hostname + '
- Timestamp: ' + d.timestamp + '
- MITRE ATT&CK: ' + (d.mitre_tactics || 'N/A') + '
- Groups: ' + (d.groups || 'N/A') + '
- Full Log: ' + (d.full_log?.substring(0, 800) || 'N/A') + '

Provide a JSON response with:
{
  "summary": "Executive Summary (2-3 sentences)",
  "iocs": ["array of IPs, hashes, domains"],
  "immediate_actions": ["recommended actions if any"],
  "severity_assessment": "Assessment"
}

Format: Professional, clinical tone. No speculation. JSON only.';

return { json: { prompt } };

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { contents: [{ parts: [{ text: $json.prompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.2, maxOutputTokens: 800 } } }}

={{ { ticket: { title: '[WAZUH] ' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.rule_description, group: 'Users', priority: $('Parse Alert').item.json.priority, state: 'new', article: { body: '

SOC Alert Briefing

' + $('Parse Response').item.json.summary + '

Severity: ' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.severity + '/15

Host: ' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.hostname + '

Source IP: ' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.source_ip + '

Rule ID: ' + $('Parse Alert').item.json.rule_id + '

IOCs: ' + ($('Parse Response').item.json.iocs || []).join(', ') + '

Immediate Actions: ' + ($('Parse Response').item.json.immediate_actions || []).join(', ') + '

Assessment: ' + ($('Parse Response').item.json.severity_assessment || 'N/A') + '

', content_type: 'text/html' } } } }}
